description: Synthetic user prompts for fine-tuning the Gmail agent. Structural only (no PII). Each prompt has one or more high-quality target plans using only the three allowed tools. The training loop iterates: ask (no Gmail) -> model emits plan -> grade intrinsically for Gmail syntax quality and intent match -> edit target if partial/bad -> regen dataset -> 're-fine-tune' (sync model to target) -> re-eval. ~200 such iterations improve the supervision signal.

prompts.prompt: Find all unread emails from my manager this week that mention the product launch.
prompts.notes: from: + is:unread + keywords + date range. Exact phrase for 'product launch'.

args.query: from:manager ("product launch" OR launch) is:unread newer_than:7d

prompts.prompt: Show me the most recent thread with Sarah about the design mocks and tell me what needs to be done next.
prompts.notes: Search first, then read the resulting thread id.

prompts.prompt: Draft a polite reply to the last email from finance saying the invoice has been approved and payment is scheduled for Friday.
prompts.notes: Locate thread, read for context if needed, then create_draft (never send).

args.subject: Re: Invoice
args.body: The invoice has been approved and payment is scheduled for Friday. [refined r200]

prompts.prompt: List all starred or labeled 'urgent' messages in my inbox from the last 14 days.
Find the email thread about the vendor contract renewal and extract any open questions or deadlines.
Create a draft to the customer success team letting them know the outage has been resolved and include the incident link.
prompts.notes: Direct draft; include plausible link from context.

args.subject: Outage resolved
args.body: The outage has been resolved. See incident link. [refined r200]

prompts.prompt: Show me the last five emails I sent to the engineering alias.
prompts.notes: in:sent + to: + perhaps limit via later UI, but query gets the set.

prompts.prompt: Search my sent mail for anything about 'roadmap' from last month and open the most relevant one.
Read the full body of the security audit email and tell me the deadline for responses.
prompts.notes: Exact phrase for title, then read.

prompts.prompt: Find any unread messages from noreply addresses that look like important notifications.
prompts.notes: from:noreply + unread. Maybe add size or 'notification'.

prompts.prompt: Draft a follow-up to the PR review thread asking for an update on the remaining comments.
prompts.notes: Search then draft (no need to read full if context is in subject).

args.subject: Re: PR review
args.body: Any update on the remaining comments from the PR review? [refined r200]

prompts.prompt: Show me all unread mail in the 'project-x' label.
Search for any attachments named something like 'report' or 'Q3' from the last two weeks.
Find the thread with the travel expenses and create a draft reply confirming the receipts are attached.

args.subject: Re: Travel
args.body: Polite, concise reply referencing the thread context. [refined r200]

prompts.prompt: List recent messages that have the label 'waiting-for-reply' and are more than 5 days old.
Open the latest email from the legal team and tell me if there are any action items for me.
Draft a short status update to the all-hands alias summarizing what was decided in yesterday's meeting.
prompts.notes: Direct draft with context in body.

args.subject: Status update
args.body: Quick status from yesterday's meeting: decisions captured. [refined r200]

prompts.prompt: Search across all folders for anything mentioning 'acquisition' or 'M&A' in the last 90 days.
prompts.notes: OR keywords + broad date across folders (default is all).
